title: METHADONE TREATMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY TREATMENT CENTER METHADONE TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medically supervised methadone maintenance to help program participants reduce and end the usage of heroin and other opioid drugs. 432 W 11th Avenue Room 170 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (541) 682-4464 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-4464 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and eligibility screening FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders Substance Use Disorder Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANE COUNTY TREATMENT CENTER
